---
title: "build_event_ticker"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `build_event_ticker()`

Build Event Ticker from Series and Date

## Usage

```r
build_event_ticker(series_ticker, date)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `series_ticker` | Character. The series ticker. |
| `date` | Date, character, or POSIXt. The event date. |

## Value

Character. The constructed event ticker.

## Description

Constructs a Kalshi event ticker from a series ticker and date.
Format: SERIES-YYMMMDD (e.g., KXHIGHNY-26FEB07)
